properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Grace, glorious grace Grace, glorious grace At the cross, you called it finished Grace, wonderful grace Grace, wonderful grace At the cross all of my sin is

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Covered, covered, covered by your grace, oh Covered, covered, covered by your grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Grace, beautiful grace Grace, beautiful grace At the cross, love everlasting Grace, powerful grace Grace, powerful grace At the cross all of my past is

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Covered, covered, covered by your grace, oh Covered, covered, covered by your grace (By your grace)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No matter what I’ve done, no matter where I’ve been No matter how I fall, You pick me up again You have removed my shame, You take me as I am You call me justified, now I am covered by Your grace

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I am covered, Lord I am covered, Lord

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Covered, covered, covered by your grace, oh Covered, covered, covered by your grace I am covered, I am covered, covered by your grace (By your grace)
